bio:
GitHub: github.com/sambacha
Telegram: t.me/sambacha
Twitter: twitter.com/blockrotator
AI Lead at @MetaMask 🦊 Founded & scaled companies in EdTech & Web3. On a mission to build and spread mass survival tech: https://survival-tech.org

True believer in DeFi - Jesus flipping tables!

Goals include: minimizing human error; optimizing strategies to remove human emotion; create & curate tools for traders & makers alike.

Mission: Crypto is currently valued at a fraction of its inherent value because it suffers from a culture problem - much like our country.  Since its inception Crypto has been more welcoming to & consistently celebrated black hat methods, triumphs, modus operandi & ethos.  I believe this is what has tens of trillions on the sidelines & aim to assist a driving force behind a cultural shift toward supporting white hat ethos.  I often offer the example of what we see far too often on the internet these days - a child missing, likely abducted; a mother & police trying to find her; the goal is to get Crypto to no longer facilitate the evading & eluding of authoritiies of the kidknapper & in its stead support & facilitate the reuniting of mother & child by LEO/Sheriff. 

Another crucial area where crypto has not met its potential is the intrinsic value of the ethical use of anonymous transactions has been largely ignored.  

I'm anxious to learn about ETH & hope soon to be developing tools & helping deliver faster data tools & analysis to traders & makers.

Hbot Cohort 12 (& likely 13) coding dev in training
location: Chamberi, Madrid / midtown bryn mawr Southern Hills, Tulsa, OK
